title: I assume he will start against New Zealand

news.title: “I assume he will start against New Zealand”: Hans Vanaken set for his first start at this World Cup, according to HLN Voetbalpodcast

world.title: I assume he will start against New Zealand

environment.compositionIntent: Warm-earth matte field with stained active negative space. The accepted environment owns the surrounding ochre/rust atmosphere while leaving the central middleground pressure slab and near foreground marks readable.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained for the first final-world preview; isolated accepted parts were authored camera-safe and the brief asks central human pressure inside surrounding field, not a portrait recrop.

contrast.notes: Soft warm lighting preserves the matte Khanna palette; black contour, white catches, and rust blocks supply focal contrast.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane
paramSemantics.positionScale: accepted module is authored at origin as the background shell; params record composition intent and do not replace module-owned geometry.

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space

compositionAdaptations: Kept as the enclosing background shell at origin so ochre ground, dark side pressure, cream diagonals, and scraped active negative space remain visible behind all parts.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the local concept reference image directly; used it only for broad warm-earth palette, dark hatching density, cream/rust contrast, and stained mural mood.
Static check passed for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no validation errors.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a dominant warm ochre/rust enclosing environment, dark side pressure, cream diagonal negative-space planes, and dense scraped contour marks; it is nonblank, camera-safe, and visibly artist/news-specific rather than a neutral backdrop.

Render report confirms WebGPU renderer mode/backend and accepted evidence for utilities.createDirectionSpaceSkyboxShell, utilities.createPointParticleField, utilities.createInstancedMarkField, MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, and declared material factory usage.
